name: CrossFlowAnalyticsExecutor

neutralConcepts: FLOW-13 availability checked via xiigen-flow-registry (flowId=FLOW-13, status=ACTIVE) — no direct HTTP
Rule 11: no direct HTTP to FLOW-13 service — fabric only
F463 IRlsPolicyService applied before returning results
CrossFlowUnavailable emitted if FLOW-13 not ACTIVE

ironRules.rule: FLOW-13 availability MUST be checked via xiigen-flow-registry — no direct HTTP (Rule 11).
F463 IRlsPolicyService applied to all cross-flow results before return.
CrossFlowQueryCompleted MUST include sourceFlows: ['FLOW-13'] and rlsApplied: true.
CrossFlowUnavailable emitted if FLOW-13 not ACTIVE.

keywords: cross-flow analytics executor FLOW-13 registry check no HTTP RLS IRlsPolicyService CrossFlowQueryCompleted CrossFlowUnavailable sourceFlows rlsApplied
